# Bridge Domain

## Verbose output

Get selected bridge domain details
- L2/L3 forwarding properties
- Multicast properties
- IGMP Snoop policy
- MLD Snoop policy
- VRF properties
- List of associated EPGs
- Endpoints with fabric and vmm information

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_bd.verbose:iserver.output.default
```

Developer

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_bd.verbose:devel.debug
```
